Tests the `Math.asin` function with a value slightly greater than 1 for NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.asin` function in JavaScript. It uses an assertion to check that the result of `Math.asin(1.0000000000000001)` is not `NaN`. This test ensures that the `Math.asin` function can handle input values slightly greater than 1 without returning `NaN`, which is important for validating the function's robustness in edge cases. The script is narrow in functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation.
